title: Rules Plugin
description: A simple Minecraft plugin to display and edit server rules.
body:
# рџ“њ Rules

A simple and flexible **Minecraft Spigot/Paper plugin** that allows server administrators to **manage and display custom server rules** using a `rules.yml` file.  
Perfect for servers that want to provide easily editable in-game or chat-displayed rule messages.

---

## вљ™пёЏ Features

- рџ§ѕ Loads and manages rules from an external `rules.yml` file  
- вњЏпёЏ Easily update or replace your server rules  
- рџ’ѕ Automatically creates a default `rules.yml` on first launch  
- вљЎ Lightweight and efficient вЂ” only loads when needed  

---

## рџ“Ѓ Installation

1. Download the plugin `.jar` file  
2. Place it inside your serverвЂ™s `plugins/` folder  
3. Start or reload your server  
4. A file named `rules.yml` will be generated in the plugin folder  

You can open and edit this file at any time to change your serverвЂ™s rules.

---

## рџ§© Developer Information

**Main utility class:**  
`de.scholle.rules.RulesManager`

**Key methods:**
- `getRulesText()` в†’ Returns the rules text stored in the YAML file  
- `setRulesText(String text)` в†’ Updates the rules text and saves it  
- `loadRules()` в†’ Initializes or reloads the rules file  

**Default file created:**  
`plugins/Rules/rules.yml`

---

## рџ§° Compatibility

- вњ… Works on **Spigot**, **Paper**, and **Purpur**  
- рџ§± Compatible with **Minecraft 1.18+**  
- вљ™пёЏ Requires **Java 17+**

---

## рџ§‘вЂЌрџ’» Author
